UNITED NATIONS - ORGANISATION DES NATIONS UNIES

No. 29870

CERTIFICATE of REGISTRATION

The SECRETARY-GENERAL of the UNITED NATIONS hereby certifies that the following international agreement been registered with the

secretariat.

in accordance with

rticle 102 of the Charter of the United Nations

CERTIFICAT d'ENREGISTREMENT

Le SECRETAIRE GENERAL de M'ORGANISATION des NATIONS UNIES certifie part enrésente que seaccord internat tommend iqué ci-après a été enregistré

au Secrétariat,

conformément

l'Article 102 de la Charte des Nations Unies :

Agreement concerning economic,

monetary and financial

co-operation.
